title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 24 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 24 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 24 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/12/2024
Today, DCE iron ore fluctuated during the day and rose slightly by the close. The most-traded I2505 contract finally settled at783 yuan/mt, up 1.29% throughout the day. Traders sold goods based on market trends, while steel mills remained cautious and purchased as needed.
